en_title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Crosses $1 Billion at the Box Office
cn_title: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》全球票房突破10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)
subtitle: 马力欧再创纪录
opus_summary: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》上映10周全球票房破10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)，成2026年首部。两部马力欧电影累计超23亿美元(约合人民币156亿元)，列动画系列第九。IGN评分6/10。

paragraphs.en: It took some time, but The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has finally crossed the $1 billion mark at the global box office.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然花了一些时间，但《超级马力欧银河大电影》终于在全球票房突破了10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)大关。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo and Illumination's Mario movie sequel took 10 weekends to pass the coveted movie milestone (via Deadline ). Although that means it reached $1 billion at much a slower pace than its predecessor, which took only 26 days , The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is now the first and only movie to cross the box office billion mark in 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂与照明娱乐的这部马力欧电影续集用了10个周末才达到这一令人垂涎的票房里程碑（据Deadline报道）。虽然这意味着它达到10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)的速度远慢于前作（前作仅用26天），但《超级马力欧银河大电影》仍是2026年首部且唯一一部突破10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)票房的影片。

paragraphs.en: With both animated adaptations finding tremendous success in theaters, the two Super Mario films have now accumulated a total of more than $2.30 billion. That lands them in the number nine spot in the list of top 10 animated franchises worldwide, with Despicable Me in first at $5.64 billion, Shrek in second at $3.98 billion, and Toy Story in third at $3.28 billion. As some of the names in the list feature franchises with as many as six total films, Mario has a good shot at shaking things up, should more sequels get the greenlight.
paragraphs.cn: 随着两部动画改编电影在影院大获成功，两部《超级马力欧》电影累计票房已超过23亿美元(约合人民币156亿元)。这使它们在全球十大动画系列电影排行榜中位列第九，其中《神偷奶爸》以56.4亿美元(约合人民币384亿元)位居第一，《怪物史莱克》以39.8亿美元(约合人民币271亿元)位居第二，《玩具总动员》以32.8亿美元(约合人民币223亿元)位居第三。考虑到榜单中有些系列多达六部电影，如果更多续集获得批准，马力欧系列大有希望改变格局。

paragraphs.en: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie took Mario, Luigi, Peach, Yoshi, and even Star Fox's Fox McCloud on an intergalactic adventure when it premiered in theaters April 1, 2026. Mixed critical response did little to stop Nintendo's latest film from kicking off with a roaring start, as it managed to pull in $34 million on the day of its Wednesday release alone .
paragraphs.cn: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》于2026年4月1日上映，将马力欧、路易吉、碧姬、耀西，甚至还有《星际火狐》中的福克斯·麦克劳德带入了一场星际冒险。褒贬不一的评论并未阻止任天堂这部最新电影取得开门红，仅在周三上映当天就收获了3400万美元(约合人民币2.3亿元)票房。

paragraphs.en: It's since spun up $428.5 million domestically and $571.5 million internationally. For comparison, The Super Mario Bros. Movie ended its box office run with $574.9 million domestically and $785.8 million internationally, bringing its total to about $1.36 billion (via Box Office Mojo ).
paragraphs.cn: 此后，该片在美国国内获得4.285亿美元(约合人民币29.2亿元)票房，国际票房为5.715亿美元(约合人民币38.9亿元)。相比之下，《超级马力欧兄弟大电影》最终国内票房为5.749亿美元(约合人民币39.1亿元)，国际票房为7.858亿美元(约合人民币53.5亿元)，总票房约13.6亿美元(约合人民币92.6亿元)（据Box Office Mojo）。

paragraphs.en: With what appears to be another home run under its belt, Nintendo is showing no sign of slowing down its film ambitions. The gaming company set an April 2028 date for its next animated movie earlier this year, and in April 2027 , fans will absolutely return to theaters to catch its live-action The Legend of Zelda movie .
paragraphs.cn: 在又一部大获成功之后，任天堂丝毫没有放缓其电影野心的迹象。这家游戏公司今年早些时候为其下一部动画电影定档2028年4月，而在2027年4月，粉丝们将重返影院观看其真人版《塞尔达传说》电影。

paragraphs.en: IGN called The Super Mario Galaxy Movie "okay" in its 6/10 review . At the time, we said it "ditches an engaging story in favor of a pipe-bursting amount of Easter eggs, but that’s not an all-together bad thing."
paragraphs.cn: IGN在6/10的评测中称《超级马力欧银河大电影》「还行」。当时我们评价道：「它放弃了引人入胜的故事，转而塞入了海量彩蛋，但这并非完全是坏事。」

audit_issues.detail: opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 94

audit_failure_reason: [summary_length] opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 94
